reviews.comment:
Es exelente, comoda y devo felicitarlos por la limpieza en los baños. Cada ves que voy y quiero ir al baño lo están limpiando y no puedo entrar.
Viajo avitualmente desde el interior a Capital Federal y cargo siempre combustible en ese lugar...

(Translated by Google)
It's excellent, comfortable, and I must congratulate them on the cleanliness of the restrooms. Every time I go and want to use the restroom, they're cleaning it, and I can't get in.
I travel regularly from the interior of the country to the Federal Capital and always fill up there...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLN3JfVnl3RRAB
